zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Sherborn於大約1277年出生在英國越可爾米頓時，他的父親John Sherburne39歲，母親Eva Carleton39歲。他與Alice Blackburne結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1342年在英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特享年66歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Sherborn于大约1277年出生在英国越可爾米頓时，他的父亲John Sherburne39岁，母亲Eva Carleton39岁。他与Alice Blackburne结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1342年在英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特享年66岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Sherborn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Sherborn was born about 1277, in Mitton, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Sherburne, was 39 and his mother, Eva Carleton, was 39. He married Alice Blackburne. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1342, in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Sherborn est né environ 1277, à Mitton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Sherburne, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Eva Carleton, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Alice Blackburne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1342, à Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Sherborn um 1277 in Mitton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Sherburne 39 und seine Mutter Eva Carleton 39. Er hat Alice Blackburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1342 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England und wurde in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Sherborn è nato il circa 1277 nel Mitton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John Sherburne, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Eva Carleton, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Alice Blackburne. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1342, nel Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Sherbornが約1277年にイギリスヨークシュアイアミットオンで生まれた時，父John Sherburneは39歳，母Eva Carletonは39歳であった。Alice Blackburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1342年にイギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルストで66歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Sherborn(이)가 대략 1277년 영국 요르크실르 미턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sherburne(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Carleton(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Alice Blackburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 영국 랭카실르 스토니후르스트에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 스토니후르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Sherborn nasceu aproximadamente 1277, em Mitton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sherburne, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Eva Carleton, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Blackburne. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1342, em Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Sherborn родился около 1277 г. в местности миттон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Sherburne было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva Carleton, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Blackburne. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1342 г. в местности стонихурст, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности стонихурст, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Sherborn nació aproximadamente 1277, en Mitton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Sherburne, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Eva Carleton, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Alice Blackburne. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1342, en Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
